---
title: "Analiza Stabilności Rankingu LOP"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 1. PRZYGOTOWANIE DANYCH DO WYKRESU
# ===============================================================
load("sesja_lop.RData") 
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)


n_objects <- N


pos_matrix <- matrix(NA, nrow = n_objects, ncol = length(S_dostrojone))

for(j in 1:length(S_dostrojone)) {

  pos_matrix[, j] <- match(1:n_objects, S_dostrojone[[j]])
}


interval_data <- data.frame(
  Powiat = obj_names,
  Opt_Pos = match(1:n_objects, res$sol), 
  Min_Pos = apply(pos_matrix, 1, min),
  Max_Pos = apply(pos_matrix, 1, max)
) %>%
  
  arrange(Opt_Pos) %>%
  
  mutate(Powiat = factor(Powiat, levels = rev(Powiat)))
```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 2. KONSTRUKCJA WYKRESU (INTERVAL PLOT)
# ===============================================================

interval_plot <- ggplot(interval_data, aes(y = Powiat)) +
  
  geom_segment(aes(x = Min_Pos, xend = Max_Pos, yend = Powiat), 
               color = "blue", size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  
  geom_point(aes(x = Min_Pos), color = "blue", size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = Max_Pos), color = "blue", size = 2) +
  
  
  geom_point(aes(x = Opt_Pos), color = "red", size = 3) +
  
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:n_objects) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = "Pozycja w rankingu",
    y = "Powiat",
    title = "Stabilność pozycji powiatów",
    subtitle = "Czerwony punkt: optimum BVNS | Niebieski zakres: warianty MLOP"
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

```

```{r}
# ===============================================================
# 3. WYŚWIETLENIE I ZAPIS
# ===============================================================

print(interval_plot)

ggsave("wykres_przedzialowy_lop.png", interval_plot, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```
